description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.x (includes JDK 17, Spring Framework 6.x, and javax.* to jakarta.* migration)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade the project from Spring Boot 2.7.18 on Java 8 to Spring Boot 3.x on Java 17. This includes: upgrading the Maven POM parent to Spring Boot 3.x, updating the Java compiler version to 17, migrating all javax.* imports to jakarta.* (e.g., javax.imageio, javax.persistence), and ensuring all existing tests pass after the upgrade.

Migrate the application from Oracle DB to PostgreSQL. This includes: replacing the Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with the PostgreSQL JDBC driver, updating Spring datasource configuration (URL, driver class, dialect), updating JPA/Hibernate dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQLDialect, and ensuring the Photo entity BLOB column (photo_data) is compatible with PostgreSQL bytea. All existing repository queries should continue to work after migration.

tasks.description: Migrate PostgreSQL to Azure Database for PostgreSQL with Managed Identity
tasks.requirements: Migrate the application from a local/self-hosted PostgreSQL instance to Azure Database for PostgreSQL using Managed Identity for secure, credential-free authentication. This includes: integrating the Azure Identity SDK for token-based authentication, replacing JDBC username/password credentials with Managed Identity token provider, updating application.properties for the Azure PostgreSQL endpoint, and ensuring the application connects successfully without storing credentials in configuration files.
